calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Leticia Perez. Petitioner Yan Wu was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing Petitioner's name changed to Yasmine Wu-Tang. Decree signed.
